list.subtitle: Browse published employees as cards. Click an avatar to start a new chat. Use "Design employee" in the top right to enter the draft workspace.
list.emptyBodySuffix: message to the Lead Agent and assign a few skills and tools — your new employee starts on the spot.

detail.dispatchPrefill: @{name} please help me with a task:
detail.skillsSubtitle: {count} skills · injected into runtime only when activated
detail.skillsEmpty: No skills mounted · only basic tool-calling capability.
detail.promptSubtitle: Appended to the employee's system prompt · shapes tone / taboos / focus
detail.promptEmpty: No custom prompt · using the platform default persona.
detail.emptyConvosBody: Click "New chat" above to start the first one — chats save automatically and appear here.

design.rosterEmpty: No employees yet · fill out the form on the right to hire your first.
design.hireSubtitle: Pick a preset → the form expands default skills / tools / iteration cap · review the final payload in the dry-run preview
design.deleteMessage: This cannot be undone. Conversations from this employee are kept, but they lose the reference to the profile.
design.templateHeading: Starting from a template is fastest
design.templateBody: Lead / Worker / Specialist / Free — each preset prefills a recommended skill set and iteration cap. You can override anything in the form; presets are never persisted, only the expanded tool_ids / skill_ids / max_iterations (§3.2).

designForm.descriptionPlaceholder: A one-line summary of the employee's role
designForm.modelHint: Defaults to the platform model; switching here pins the choice on the employee profile.
designForm.sectionPresetSubtitle: Pick one · expands to tool_ids / skill_ids / max_iterations on save (preset itself is not persisted)
designForm.sectionSkillsSubtitle: Preset defaults are pre-checked; adjust freely
designForm.sectionMcpSubtitle: Tools from selected MCP servers are exposed to this employee
designForm.sectionMaxIterSubtitle: Max tool-call rounds per session · presets only set the default — free to adjust here (1-10000)
designForm.promptHint: Personality / style / forbidden actions — or let AI draft one from the name / description / skills / MCP above
designForm.aiTooltip: Use AI to draft a system prompt from the current form (overwrites existing content)
designForm.previewEmpty: Nothing yet — switch to "Edit" to write, or click "AI draft"
designForm.composeNoBody: Generation failed: response had no body
designForm.sectionDryRunSubtitle: The expanded triple — matches the persisted payload exactly

dryRun.title: Dry run preview
dryRun.intro: Click "Run preview" to see the final triple persisted (tool_ids / skill_ids / max_iterations); it does not actually create the employee.

mcpPicker.empty: No MCP servers registered yet. Register one on the "MCP servers" page, then come back to mount it.

presetRadio.executeCaption: Direct work · no plan · no subagents · 10 iter default (editable)
presetRadio.planCaption: Plan + self-execute · no subagents · 15 iter default (editable)
presetRadio.planSubagentCaption: Plan + dispatch parallel subagents · 20 iter default (editable)

skillPicker.empty: No skills installed yet. Install one on the "Skills" page, then come back to mount it.
skillPicker.selectedEmpty: Nothing mounted yet — pick from the groups below

list.subtitle: Async units of work · once created you can close the page; employees finish them in the background and you check back for results. Have the Lead Agent dispatch one in chat, or click "New task" in the top right.
list.emptyNeedsUser: No tasks waiting on your reply or approval
list.emptyBody: Have the Lead Agent dispatch one in chat, or create one manually.

detail.notFoundHint: It may have been cancelled or deleted.
detail.runsEmpty: No runs assigned yet · they'll appear once TaskExecutor picks it up.
detail.answerPlaceholder: A line or two back to the employee · Enter to send / Shift+Enter for newline
detail.approvalDefaultSummary: The employee is asking you to approve an action.
detail.approvalNotePlaceholder: Optional · leave a note for the employee
detail.cancelTaskMessage: Cancelling stops any running run. Already-produced artifacts are kept, but the task does not continue.

newDrawer.title: New task
newDrawer.subtitle: Once created you can close the page; the employee runs in the background.
newDrawer.noEmployees: No employees yet · create one on the "Employees" page first.
newDrawer.goalPlaceholder: Turn last week's release PRs into Chinese release notes for customers, highlighting feature XYZ.
newDrawer.dodFooter: The more specific, the less the employee drifts. At minimum answer "what to output / what must be included / what must not be included".
newDrawer.dodPlaceholder:
- Output format: (e.g. markdown / PDF / Figma link)
- Must include: (3-5 key items)
- Must not include: (common pitfalls)
- Acceptance signal: (how I'll know it's done at a glance)
newDrawer.footerHint: Tasks without a DoD are not added to the execution queue.
